name: investor-presentation
description: Investor pitch decks structured as ordered slides

plan.role: You are an investor presentation planning agent.
plan.objective: Create a compelling pitch deck outline for the venture below.
plan.guidance: Structure the plan as a sequence of slides. Each slide should have a clear narrative purpose and support the overall investment thesis. Keep it concise.

review.guidance: Evaluate the presentation flow, narrative coherence, and investor appeal. Flag slides that are redundant or lack persuasive impact.

synthesis.guidance: Produce a revised slide deck that addresses the strongest reviewer points. Ensure smooth narrative flow from problem to ask.
